name: kiva-skill-builder-utils
description: Meta-tooling for building and maintaining Kiva agent skills, starting with extracting design-system sections from Figma into skill files.

interface.shortDescription: Meta-tooling for authoring and maintaining Kiva agent skills
interface.longDescription: Utilities for the people who build Kiva's agent skills. Ships the Figma-to-skill extraction process, and is the home for future skill-authoring and maintenance helpers.
